extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT won the stage 4 ITT, beating teammate ROGLIČ by 4 seconds to retake yellow after LAPORTE lost 30 seconds on the uphill finish.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma 1-2-3 sweep (van Aert, Roglič, Dennis) reveals depth allowing aggressive stage racing tactics in subsequent stages.
YATES beat intermediate time check versus DENNIS but lost 5 seconds on difficult summit finish, exposing pacing weakness.
LAPORTE sacrificed yellow jersey losing 30 seconds, suggesting team prioritized van Aert/Roglič GC over domestique morale.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Beat Olympic champion Roglič by 4 seconds on climbing TT, confirms genuine GC threat not just stage hunter
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Fastest at intermediate check over Dennis shows improved TT form, but summit fade suggests pacing misjudgment
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Only 4 seconds behind van Aert confirms TT form but raises team leadership ambiguity with two GC threats
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: Third place as domestique indicates exceptional Jumbo TT depth for pace-setting in mountain stages
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: Seventh place, significantly behind rivals, unusual weakness for Olympic TT champion on climbing course
